economic_ownership_map.label: Tangible common equity
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Marks tangible capital for credit, asset quality, and regulatory constraints rather than treating all book value as distributable.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: 2025 annual report tangible common equity and TBVPS.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Normalized franchise return value
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Present value of sustainable returns above or below the required return on tangible common equity.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: 2025 RoTCE was 7.7%; a full-cycle, segment-level return bridge is still required.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Transformation and excess-capital realization
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Only value capital that can be returned after transformation costs, stress losses, and regulatory buffers.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: CET1 was 13.18%; release timing and regulatory minimums remain unverified.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Credit, funding, and regulatory reserve
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Explicit deduction for a worse credit cycle, funding pressure, conduct costs, and capital trapped above management targets.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Annual-report credit, funding, and regulatory disclosures; detailed stress reconciliation pending.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

judgments.label: Tangible common equity
judgments.evidence: 2025 annual report tangible common equity and TBVPS.

judgments.label: Normalized franchise return value
judgments.evidence: 2025 RoTCE was 7.7%; a full-cycle, segment-level return bridge is still required.

judgments.label: Transformation and excess-capital realization
judgments.evidence: CET1 was 13.18%; release timing and regulatory minimums remain unverified.

judgments.label: Credit, funding, and regulatory reserve
judgments.evidence: Annual-report credit, funding, and regulatory disclosures; detailed stress reconciliation pending.

method_route.label: Credit, funding, and normalized financial returns
failure_modes: industrial EV multiple applied to a financial balance sheet
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

blockers: segment_rotce_normalization: Reconcile segment tangible capital, through-cycle credit costs, expenses, taxes, and normalized RoTCE.
distributable_capital: Reconcile regulatory minimums, management buffers, stress losses, transformation costs, and the timing of actual capital return.
stress_claims: Build an independently reviewed credit, funding, legal, and regulatory stress bridge.

falsifiers: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material economic claim is valued exactly once and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
cohort_purpose: Tangible capital, normalized RoTCE, credit loss, regulation, and capital return.
